bugs_found.description: signNoZero<float> returns 0 for NaN, violates ne_zero.
negate<int16_t> is not a global involution. negate(negate(-32767))=-32768. INT16_MAX special case wrong.

expo_e_clamping_divergence: Key finding: expoRat clamps e to [0,1] but C++ expo does NOT. If caller passes e outside [0,1], results differ. CORRESPONDENCE.md documents this.

Pattern for concrete constrainRat: have hc : constrainRat x lo hi = v := by native_decide; simp only [expoRat, hc, ...]
Rat.sub_zero does NOT exist - use Rat.sub_eq_add_neg + Rat.neg_zero + Rat.add_zero
